title: Force OUT W1 Value to Release an AGV Stuck Condition
summary: Use the documented OUT W1 forced value entry on the operator station HMI to continue AGV operation or send the AGV to the hospital in the AGV Stuck recovery procedure.
when_to_use: Use this procedure for the documented AGV Stuck recovery action on the operator station HMI when an AGV remains at the tipper after tote-tipping is complete and the manual recovery requires forcing the OUT W1 value for the selected tipper.
not_for: Do not use if the correct tipper is not confirmed before entering a forced value.
Do not use when the required AGV disposition is unclear between continuing work and going to the hospital.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Perform the forced OUT W1 value entry and checkbox toggle on the operator station HMI for the selected tipper.

safety_notes: This procedure changes a forced output value on the HMI.
Make sure the correct tipper is selected before changing any forced value.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the "Visu_ManControl" and "CellIO Status" HMI area
Ability to enter an "OUT W1" forced value and toggle the associated checkbox

access_required: Access to the "Visu_ManControl" and "CellIO Status" HMI area
system_preconditions: AGV Stuck recovery is being performed for the affected tipper.
The correct tipper is identified before entering the forced value.

visual_references.description: Operator station screen artifact associated with the AGV Stuck recovery procedure and OUT W1 forced value workflow.
Operator station screen artifact associated with selecting the tipper and applying the OUT W1 forced value.
Manual control HMI screen showing access to CellIO Status from Visu_ManControl.

steps.title: Confirm the correct tipper on CellIO Status
steps.purpose: Prevent forcing the OUT W1 value on the wrong tipper.
steps.instruction: On the operator station HMI, make sure the correct tipper is selected on the CellIO Status view before changing any forced value.
steps.expected_result: The affected tipper is confirmed as the selected tipper on the CellIO Status view.
steps.healthy_condition: The correct tipper is visibly selected before any forced value is entered.
steps.failure_condition: The correct tipper cannot be confirmed or there is uncertainty about which tipper is selected.

actions.label: Verify selected tipper
actions.exact_action: Make sure the correct tipper is selected on the CellIO Status view before changing any forced value.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: CellIO Status view for the affected tipper selection in the AGV Stuck recovery context.
HMI area showing the selected tipper and the OUT W1 forced value area.
Visu_ManControl screen and CellIO Status access path.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the correct tipper is not confirmed before entering a forced value.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Make sure the correct tipper is selected then enter a value of 3 in the OUT W1 forced value box if the tote and AGV are ready to continue working. If the AGV needs to go to the hospital, enter a value of 32771.
For AGV stuck verification, the operator station HMI references the Visu_ManControl screen and the CellIO Status button.

steps.title: Enter the documented OUT W1 forced value
steps.purpose: Apply the manual recovery value that matches the intended AGV disposition.
steps.instruction: Enter a value of 3 in the "OUT W1" forced value box if the tote and AGV are ready to continue working, or enter 32771 if the AGV needs to go to the hospital.
steps.expected_result: The correct documented OUT W1 value is entered in the forced value box for the selected tipper.
steps.healthy_condition: The forced value box contains either 3 for continue working or 32771 for hospital, matching the intended outcome.
steps.failure_condition: The required AGV disposition is unclear, the value cannot be entered, or a different unsupported value would be required.

actions.label: Enter OUT W1 value
actions.exact_action: Enter a value of 3 in the "OUT W1" forced value box if the tote and AGV are ready to continue working. If the AGV needs to go to the hospital, enter a value of 32771.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: OUT W1 forced value field for the selected tipper in the AGV Stuck recovery screen.
Example location of the OUT W1 forced value entry area on the operator station screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the required AGV disposition is unclear because the source provides two different documented values for different outcomes.
Escalate if the HMI does not allow the value to be entered as documented.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Make sure the correct tipper is selected then enter a value of 3 in the OUT W1 forced value box if the tote and AGV are ready to continue working. If the AGV needs to go to the hospital, enter a value of 32771.
The AGV stuck section references OUT W1 forced values: 3 for tote and AGV ready to continue working, and 32771 if the AGV needs to go to the hospital.

steps.title: Check the box next to the forced value
steps.purpose: Apply the entered forced OUT W1 value.
steps.instruction: Check the box next to the value entered in the forced value box.
steps.expected_result: The checkbox next to the entered OUT W1 forced value is checked.
steps.healthy_condition: The checkbox is applied to the entered forced value as documented.
steps.failure_condition: The checkbox cannot be applied to the entered value.

actions.label: Apply forced value checkbox
actions.exact_action: Check the box next to the value introduced in the forced value box.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Checkbox next to the OUT W1 forced value field.
Forced value checkbox control associated with OUT W1.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the checkbox cannot be applied as documented.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Check the box next to the value introduced in the forced value box.

steps.title: Wait 10 seconds
steps.purpose: Allow the documented forced value application interval to complete before removing it.
steps.expected_result: Ten seconds elapse after the OUT W1 forced value checkbox is checked.
steps.healthy_condition: The full 10-second wait is observed before the checkbox is removed.
steps.failure_condition: The wait cannot be completed as documented.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Wait 10 seconds, then uncheck the box for value OUT W1.

steps.title: Uncheck the OUT W1 box
steps.purpose: Remove the forced OUT W1 value after the documented wait period.
steps.instruction: Uncheck the box for value "OUT W1".
steps.expected_result: The OUT W1 checkbox is unchecked after the 10-second wait.
steps.healthy_condition: The forced value checkbox is removed as documented after the wait period.
steps.failure_condition: The checkbox cannot be removed as documented.

actions.label: Remove forced value checkbox
actions.exact_action: Uncheck the box for value "OUT W1".

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: OUT W1 checkbox state after the 10-second wait.
Checkbox next to OUT W1 being cleared after the forced value interval.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the checkbox cannot be removed as documented.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Wait 10 seconds, then uncheck the box for value OUT W1.

success_criteria: The documented OUT W1 forced value is entered for the selected tipper.
The checkbox next to the entered value is checked, held for 10 seconds, and then unchecked.
The manual recovery action described for the AGV Stuck condition is completed as documented.
healthy_conditions: The correct tipper is selected before any forced value is entered.
The entered OUT W1 value matches one of the two documented values: 3 or 32771.
The checkbox can be applied and then removed after 10 seconds as documented.
failure_conditions: The correct tipper is not confirmed before entering a forced value.
The required AGV disposition is unclear between continue working and hospital.
The HMI does not allow the value to be entered.
The checkbox cannot be applied or removed as documented.
escalation_guidance: Stop if the correct tipper is not confirmed before entering a forced value.
Escalate if the required AGV disposition is unclear because the source provides two different documented values for different outcomes.
Escalate if the HMI does not allow the value to be entered or the checkbox cannot be applied or removed as documented.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Make sure the correct tipper is selected then enter a value of 3 in the OUT W1 forced value box if the tote and AGV are ready to continue working. If the AGV needs to go to the hospital, enter a value of 32771.
Check the box next to the value introduced in the forced value box.
Wait 10 seconds, then uncheck the box for value OUT W1.

missing_details: The source packet does not provide an explicit estimated completion time for the full procedure.
The source packet does not explicitly state whether production stop or LOTO is required.
The source packet does not provide explicit post-action confirmation criteria beyond applying and removing the forced value.

The source packet references the broader AGV Stuck verification path on Visu_ManControl and CellIO Status, but this candidate begins at the forced-value action rather than restating the full verification sequence.
